meta.task: TASK A - complete containment-adjacent pair-shape taxonomy, current Kalshi combo board

definitions.constructible: side-mix buildable on the exchange given collections is_yes_only/size_max + validator probes
definitions.farmable: the impossible mix: combo can only settle NO; quoting its complement is riskless (convention combo_no_pays_complement promoted true 2026-07-10)

sources.tape: data/combomaker-prod.sqlite3 rfqs (18.03M rows, 2026-07-06..07-11T15:14Z; full scan >=07-09 + 1/13 sample before) -> tape_universe.json
sources.collections: GET /multivariate_event_collections (open: KXMVESPORTSMULTIGAMEEXTENDED-R, KXMVECROSSCATEGORY-R; per-event is_yes_only/size_max; associated_events truncates at 250) -> collections.json

key_line_facts.KXWCTOTAL: over-0.5 EXISTS (live lines 1..6); KXUCLTOTAL does NOT list it (2..5)
key_line_facts.KXMLBTOTAL: lowest ever 2 (tape), 3..13 open — no over-0.5/1.5 today

unpaired_justifications.KXMLBKS: starting-pitcher strikeouts share no entity with batter props and imply nothing about ML/total/RFI at any line
unpaired_justifications.KXMLBGAME x KXMLBTOTAL: MLB cannot end 0-0 (extras until decided) so win => >=1 run is vacuous AND no total-1 line has ever existed (tape min 2)
unpaired_justifications.KXMLBRFI x KXMLBGAME/props: a first-inning run implies nothing about the winner or any player stat
unpaired_justifications.KXWNBATOTAL: live totals 142..182 vs spreads <=23 / PTS <=30: margin<=total and player-pts<=total implications never reach a live line pair
unpaired_justifications.KXWNBAPTS x KXWNBAGAME/TOTAL: no logical link at live lines (player 30+ vs total 142+ gap)
unpaired_justifications.KXPGAR1LEAD: leading after R1 implies neither making the cut (36-hole cut) nor any finish position; no R1-score series exists to pair with
unpaired_justifications.KXATPCHALLENGERMATCH/KXWTACHALLENGERMATC: no challenger tournament-winner series is combo-eligible, so no cross-scope pair exists
unpaired_justifications.KXUFCFIGHT x KXUFCROUNDS: the winner's identity says nothing about fight duration
unpaired_justifications.KXUFCFIGHT x KXUFCMOF-SUB/KOTKODQ/DEC: method markets are fighter-agnostic ('either competitor'), so no winner implication (only DRAW excludes, S48)
unpaired_justifications.KXWCCORNERS/TCORNERS x goals/btts/game/s: corner counts and goals are correlated but share no logical implication
unpaired_justifications.KXWCBTTS x KXWCSPREAD: 4-1 satisfies both BTTS and spread-3: no implication either way
unpaired_justifications.KXWCGAME-TIE x KXWCBTTS/TOTAL over: a draw can be 0-0 or 3-3: no pairwise over/under implication (draw => even total is a parity fact expressible only in triples, e.g. TIE+over0.5 => over1.5)
unpaired_justifications.KXWC1H-TIE x FT markets: level at half implies nothing at full time
unpaired_justifications.crypto KX*15M / KX*D: combo-eligible but each bucket settles on its own window and reference price: no cross-window implication
unpaired_justifications.same-event exclusive families: GAME A/B/TIE, ADVANCE A/B, MOF, FIRSTGOAL players+NOGOAL, MATCH A/B, FIGHT A/B are mutually exclusive WITHIN one event — handled by event-level mutual-exclusion logic (and size_max=1 for most), not pair shapes
unpaired_justifications.not on the current combo board: TEAM_TOTAL (KXNFLTEAMTOTAL), F5 (KXMLBF5TOTAL/F5SPREAD), EXTRAS, NBA/NFL/NHL series, KXWC outright winner, KXATPGAMETOTAL-style tennis props: zero legs in the 18.03M-RFQ tape AND absent from the open collections' associated_events -> excluded until they list

shapes.line_condition: ROUNDS rungs 2..5 live; k <= scheduled rounds
shapes.scope_note: a (full) decision means the fight went the distance

shapes.name: tournament_winner => match_winner  [CONDITIONAL/DORMANT]
shapes.leg_b: KX{ATP,WTA}MATCH-<match>-<PLAYER> yes, same player, match inside that tournament
shapes.implication: A_yes => B_yes when the match is played (retirement/walkover settlement nuances apply)
shapes.line_condition: CURRENTLY DORMANT: only KXATP-26USO / KXWTA-26USO are open (US Open, starts ~Aug 31) while open MATCH markets belong to other tournaments; goes LIVE during any slam the two coexist
shapes.scope_note: winning the tournament requires winning every match you play in it; event codes differ (26USO vs per-match game codes) so the mapping is by tournament membership, not game key

shapes.name: finish-position chain: win => top5 => top10 => top20 => make_cut
shapes.leg_a:
KXPGATOUR--

/ KXPGATOP5 / KXPGATOP10 / KXPGATOP20 (same player, same tournament)
shapes.leg_b: any later element of the chain (10 transitive pairs)
shapes.implication: A_yes => B_yes along the chain (TOP-k includes ties, rules verified; TOPk => MAKECUT valid at cut events — no-cut events don't list MAKECUT)
shapes.line_condition: all five series live (THOC26 - The Open; GESO26; ISC26 on tape); all yes-only -> ONLY the redundant yes+yes mix is side-constructible
shapes.scope_note: tournament scope (not per-game); ties inclusion keeps the chain monotone
